title: Engine
text: Service procedures for the 2.0T and 1.6 litre engine families.

title: Ignition System Overview
text: The 2.0T engine uses one coil-on-plug ignition coil (part IC-2042-A) per cylinder with spark plug set SP-1108. Coils are matched to the engine calibration.

title: Ignition Coil Replacement
text: Remove the engine cover and disconnect the coil connector. Replace ignition coil IC-2042-A as an assembly. Applies to misfire codes P0301 and P0300 after plug condition is confirmed.

title: Misfire Diagnosis
text: For codes P0300 and P0301, swap coils between cylinders and retest. If the misfire follows the coil, replace it. Inspect spark plug set SP-1108 for gap and fouling.

title: Exhaust and Catalyst
text: Catalyst efficiency code P0420 requires upstream and downstream oxygen sensor comparison before replacing catalytic converter CAT-5500.

title: Electrical
text: Charging, battery, and control module service.

title: Charging System
text: Test alternator ALT-8810 output under load before replacing battery BAT-1200. Code P0562 indicates system voltage below threshold.

title: Engine Control Module
text: Engine control module ECM-9901 must be programmed with the latest calibration after replacement.

title: Brakes
text: Brake system inspection and service.

title: Brake Pad Service
text: Replace front pads with brake pad kit BP-7720. Measure rotor thickness before reuse.

title: Brakes
text: Brake system service for all Heron variants.

title: Front Brake Pad and Rotor Service
text: Replace pads with brake pad kit BP-7720. On vehicles with judder complaints, replace rotors BR-7731 in pairs - do not machine.

title: Brake Hose Inspection
text: Inspect front brake hose BH-7745 for abrasion at the strut bracket at every service.

title: ABS Diagnosis
text: Codes C0035 and U0121 - check wheel speed sensor WSS-3300 wiring at the wheel arch before module replacement.

title: Chassis Electrical
text: Electrical service for chassis systems.

title: Wheel Speed Sensor Replacement
text: Replace wheel speed sensor WSS-3300 and route the harness clear of the spring. Clears code C0035 after relearn.

title: Battery and Charging
text: Battery BAT-1200 and alternator ALT-8810 service points are shared with the Falcon platform.

title: Electrical
text: Electrical service for the Osprey platform.

title: Wheel Speed Sensor Replacement
text: Replace wheel speed sensor WSS-3300. Code C0035 indicates left front sensor circuit fault.

title: Charging System
text: Alternator ALT-8810 output test. Code P0562 sets when system voltage is low at idle.

title: Engine
text: Engine service for the 3.5 V6.

title: Misfire Diagnosis
text: For code P0300 inspect spark plug set SP-1108 and check for intake leaks before component replacement.

title: Condition
text: Some 2019-2021 Falcon vehicles with the 2.0T engine exhibit repeat misfire codes P0301 or P0300 after a coil has already been replaced.

title: Cause
text: The original ignition coil IC-2042-A insulation can degrade under repeated heat cycles, causing intermittent misfire that returns after replacement with the same part.

title: Repair Procedure
text: Replace all coils with revised ignition coil IC-2042-B, which supersedes IC-2042-A. Replace spark plug set SP-1108 if beyond half service life. Do not reinstall IC-2042-A from stock.

title: Condition
text: Heron vehicles return with steering wheel vibration under braking within months of a front pad replacement using brake pad kit BP-7720.

title: Repair Procedure
text: Replace front rotors BR-7731 in pairs together with brake pad kit BP-7720. Pad-only repairs on worn rotors cause the judder to return.

title: Condition
text: Heron and Osprey vehicles set intermittent codes C0035 or U0121, often with no fault found on retest.

title: Repair Procedure
text: Replace wheel speed sensor WSS-3300 and secure the revised harness clip. Do not replace the ABS module for these codes.

title: Condition
text: Falcon vehicles present with code P0562, dim lights at idle, or repeat flat batteries.

title: Repair Procedure
text: Test alternator ALT-8810 under load before fitting battery BAT-1200. Battery-only repairs do not correct the underlying low-output alternator.

title: Condition
text: Falcon vehicles set code P0420 following an earlier engine calibration update, with no driveability complaint.

title: Repair Procedure
text: Apply the revised calibration. Replace catalytic converter CAT-5500 only if efficiency remains below threshold after the update.

title: Defect Description
text: On certain 2019-2020 Falcon vehicles, the ignition coil IC-2042-A connector can overheat, increasing the risk of an engine compartment fire.

title: Remedy
text: Dealers will replace the coils with revised ignition coil IC-2042-B and the associated connector free of charge.

title: Defect Description
text: On certain Heron vehicles, the front brake hose BH-7745 can contact the strut bracket, abrading the hose and risking brake fluid loss.

title: Remedy
text: Dealers will inspect and replace brake hose BH-7745 with a revised routing clip free of charge.
